title: Bad checkout deploy causes 5xx and latency
summary: A v2 rollout of the checkout service introduces a null-pointer regression in discount handling. POST /checkout starts returning 5xx and latency rises; the user-facing api-gateway propagates the errors. The orders-pg database stays healthy, which is counter-evidence against a database cause.
question: Why did checkout start returning 5xx around 14:05 on 2026-06-01?

ground_truth.notes: Time alignment (deploy at 14:03, errors from 14:03), error signature (NPE in applyDiscount), and a healthy downstream DB together point to the deploy. The DB hypothesis must be returned as weakened counter-evidence, not silently dropped.
